key_points: Political parties face challenges such as lack of internal democracy
Dynastic succession is a major issue in many parties
Money and muscle power influence candidate selection
Sometimes voters do not get meaningful choices between parties
Political reforms aim to improve transparency and accountability
examples: Dynastic leadership occurs when leadership remains within a family
Money power may influence election campaigns
Coalition governments often include regional parties
Media and citizens play roles in demanding political reforms
formulas: Internal Democracy = Participation of Members in Decision Making
Anti-Defection Law = Prevents elected representatives from switching parties
exam_tips: Understand the four major challenges to political parties
Use examples of coalition governments in answers
Explain how citizens can contribute to political reforms
